positive: A minimalist, elegant illustration of a majestic howling wolf standing silhouetted against a vibrant, nebula-filled twilight sky. The wolf should be the central focus, rendered with sharply defined edges and dynamic poses. The background incorporates deep sapphire blues, ethereal violets, and touches of cosmic cyan, suggesting a blend of forest mystery and celestial wonder. Incorporate scattered, abstract geometric elements like crystalline structures or stylized constellations orbiting the wolf, enhancing the graphic, print-ready aesthetic. Style should be neo-tribal mixed with sophisticated scientific illustration, ensuring strong contrast and bold color separation suitable for fabric printing. Cinematic lighting, high resolution, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermarks, logo, signature, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, cartoon, realistic, photorealistic
